quiz.question:
Black proposes a bishop trade. 

Should you accept it and why or why not?

answers.text: Yes, because it's a drawn king and pawn endgame.

feedback.text: Exactly! After that you can control the key g2 and g1 squares.

distractors.text: No, because it's simply a quicker loss.

feedback.text: Are you sure it's losing? Think about key squares.

distractors.text: No, because to draw the bishop needs to be on the board.

feedback.text: I don't think drawing will be possilble here.
